source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 广西南宁洪涝灾害已致2人死亡
topics.official_english: Flooding in Nanning, Guangxi Claims 2 Lives
topics.why_hot: Severe flooding in Guangxi has caused casualties and widespread damage, drawing national attention to disaster response.
topics.share_angle: Explain the causes and impact of the flooding, and how local authorities are responding.

topics.chinese_topic: 多地紧急响应全力防汛抢险
topics.official_english: Multiple Regions Activate Emergency Flood Control and Rescue Operations
topics.why_hot: Multiple provinces are mobilizing resources to combat severe flooding, reflecting the scale of the disaster.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the coordinated flood response across China and the challenges faced.

topics.chinese_topic: 直径1000公里超强台风逼近或直扑浙江
topics.official_english: Super Typhoon with 1,000-km Diameter Approaching Zhejiang
topics.why_hot: A massive super typhoon threatens China's eastern coast, prompting widespread concern and preparations.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind super typhoons and the potential impact on Zhejiang.

topics.chinese_topic: 不到2年 中国再向太平洋发射战略导弹
topics.official_english: China Launches Strategic Missile into Pacific for Second Time in Under Two Years
topics.why_hot: China's missile test into the Pacific has strategic implications and draws international attention.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the significance of the missile test and its context in global security.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯“最贵”的一场较量来了
topics.why_hot: A high-stakes World Cup match with top players generates massive fan interest.
topics.share_angle: Preview the match and explain why it's considered the 'most expensive' in terms of player value.

topics.chinese_topic: 北京空中出现巨幕雨幡
topics.official_english: Giant Rain Curtain Appears in Beijing Sky
topics.why_hot: A rare meteorological phenomenon in Beijing captivates residents and goes viral online.
topics.share_angle: Explain what a rain curtain is and the weather conditions that create it.

topics.chinese_topic: 男子在自家酒楼旁开“一元饭堂”
topics.official_english: Man Opens 'One-Yuan Canteen' Next to His Restaurant
topics.why_hot: A heartwarming story of a man providing affordable meals to the needy resonates with the public.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the social impact and the man's motivation behind the initiative.

topics.chinese_topic: 惊艳！北京雨后再现双彩虹
topics.official_english: Stunning Double Rainbow Appears Over Beijing After Rain
topics.why_hot: A beautiful double rainbow after rain brings joy and awe to Beijing residents.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science of double rainbows and share the visual spectacle.
